title: Debt Recovery – Effective Collection of Unpaid Amounts
description: Effective debt recovery: pre-litigation stage, court proceedings, enforcement. We recover debts for businesses and individuals. Specter & Associates Law Firm, Warsaw.
content:
Debt Recovery – Don't Let Your Money Disappear

Unpaid invoices, overdue loans, outstanding compensation – recovering money from unreliable debtors is a problem faced by both businesses and private individuals. Specter & Associates Law Firm in Warsaw offers comprehensive debt recovery services – from the first demand letter through to bailiff enforcement. We act promptly, effectively and persistently.

Pre-Litigation Debt Recovery

The first step in recovering a debt is amicable collection. It is faster and cheaper than court proceedings and, in many cases, sufficient on its own. In the pre-litigation stage we take the following steps:

  • Formal demand letter – a legally worded demand drafted by a solicitor carries far greater weight with a debtor than one sent by the creditor directly,
  • Negotiations – we enter into discussions with the debtor to agree voluntary repayment terms,
  • Settlement agreement – we help negotiate an agreement setting out a repayment schedule, possible waiver of interest or ancillary charges,
  • Debtor investigation – where necessary, we assess the debtor's financial position to evaluate the realistic prospects of recovery.

Court Proceedings – Obtaining an Enforcement Title

When pre-litigation collection produces no result, we refer the matter to court. Our lawyers prepare and conduct proceedings including:

  • Order for payment in summary proceedings – where the claim arises from a bill of exchange, cheque or official document,
  • Order for payment in default proceedings – the fastest route for undisputed monetary claims; the court issues the order without a hearing,
  • Electronic payment order proceedings (EPU) – proceedings conducted by the e-Court, with the option to file the claim online,
  • Ordinary proceedings – where the claim is contested and requires a full hearing with evidence.

Once we obtain a final court judgment and have it declared enforceable (enforcement title), we refer the matter to a bailiff for enforcement.

Bailiff Enforcement

Bailiff enforcement is the compulsory recovery of a debt by a court bailiff acting on an enforcement title. Our lawyers:

  • file the enforcement application with the appropriate bailiff on behalf of the client,
  • identify any known assets of the debtor and request the application of appropriate enforcement measures,
  • monitor the progress of enforcement proceedings,
  • apply for the bailiff to search for undisclosed assets,
  • respond to defensive measures taken by the debtor (objections, complaints).

Costs of Debt Recovery

We understand that clients are concerned about the costs of debt recovery, particularly when they themselves are facing cash flow difficulties. That is why we offer flexible fee structures:

  • Contingency fee – in certain cases, our firm's remuneration is calculated as a percentage of the amount recovered,
  • Fixed fee – a flat charge for handling the pre-litigation and/or court stage,
  • Combined fee – a modest fixed element plus a percentage of the amount recovered.

Court fees and bailiff charges are generally borne by the debtor and are added to the amount awarded. Contact our firm to learn more about the terms of cooperation.
